node -max-old-space-size=8192 build/phaseA/pyret.jarr --outfile url-import.jarr \
                      --build-runnable url-import.arr \
                      --builtin-js-dir src/js/trove/ \
                      --builtin-arr-dir src/arr/trove/ \
                      --compiled-dir compiled/ \
                      --url-file-mode all-local \
                      --require-config src/scripts/standalone-configA.json
Gathering dependencies...                         Compiling worklist...                     Loading existing compiled modules...                                    Compiling 1/2: lib.arr                      1/2 modules compiled (lib.arr)                              Compiling 2/2: url-import.arr                             2/2 modules compiled (url-import.arr)
Cleaning up and generating standalone...
